name: Add Activity Tracking Endpoint
description: Add a POST /api/users/:id/activity endpoint that logs an activity entry for a user. Each activity has: { action: string, timestamp: string, details?: object }. Store in-memory. Return the created activity with 201. Must validate that action is non-empty string.

name: Add Pagination to GET /api/users
description: Add pagination support to the GET /api/users endpoint. Accept ?page=1&limit=10 query params. Return { data: [...], total: number, page: number, limit: number, totalPages: number }. Default page=1, limit=10. max limit=100.
successCriteria: GET /api/users?page=1&limit=2 returns 2 users with pagination metadata

name: Add Rate Limiting Middleware
description: Add rate limiting middleware that limits requests to /api/* to 100 requests per minute per IP. Store counters in-memory. Return 429 with { error: 'Rate limit exceeded', retryAfter: number } when exceeded. Exclude /health endpoint. Make the limit configurable via RATE_LIMIT_MAX env var (default 100).
successCriteria: Rate limit middleware is applied to /api/* routes
